CustomField.description: Indicates the days within the installment period based on the chosen interest base for the loan. In the case of 30/360, 30 assumed days are considered for the full installment period; otherwise, it reflects the actual number of days in the installment period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days within the installment period based on the selected interest base for the loan.
CustomField.label: Period Length in Days
